问题四：¶

In [9]:
import numpy as np
import cvxpy as cp
import time

def project_simplex_sorting(v):
    n = len(v)
    u = np.sort(v)[::-1]
    cssv = np.cumsum(u)
    ind = np.arange(1, n + 1)
    cond = u + (1.0 / ind) * (1.0 - cssv) > 0
    rho = ind[cond][-1]
    theta = (cssv[rho - 1] - 1.0) / rho
    x = np.maximum(v - theta, 0)
    return x, theta

v1 = np.array([1.4, 0.5, -0.2, 2.0, 0.3], dtype=float)
In [10]:
# (a)
x_cvx_var = cp.Variable(len(v1))
prob = cp.Problem(cp.Minimize(0.5 * cp.sum_squares(x_cvx_var - v1)),
                 [x_cvx_var >= 0, cp.sum(x_cvx_var) == 1])
prob.solve()
x_cvx = x_cvx_var.value
In [11]:
# (b)
x_alg, theta_alg = project_simplex_sorting(v1)
In [ ]:
# (c)
dist = np.linalg.norm(x_cvx - x_alg)
print(f"i.  ||x_cvx - x_alg||_2: {dist:.2e}")

def report_residuals(x, name):
    res_sum = np.abs(np.sum(x) - 1)
    res_min = np.min(x)
    print(f"ii. {name} 残差 -> |1^T x - 1|: {res_sum:.2e}, min(x_i): {res_min:.2e}")

report_residuals(x_cvx, "CVX")
report_residuals(x_alg, "Alg")

mu = np.maximum(theta_alg - v1, 0)
stationarity = np.linalg.norm(x_alg - v1 + theta_alg - mu)
complementarity = np.linalg.norm(mu * x_alg)
print(f"iii. 平稳性残差: {stationarity:.2e}")
print(f"iv. 互补性残差: {complementarity:.2e}")

i.  ||x_cvx - x_alg||_2: 2.78e-17
ii. CVX 残差 -> |1^T x - 1|: 0.00e+00, min(x_i): -1.31e-22
ii. Alg 残差 -> |1^T x - 1|: 0.00e+00, min(x_i): 0.00e+00
iii. 平稳性残差: 0.00e+00
iv. 互补性残差: 0.00e+00
In [13]:
# (d)
print("\n大规模测试")
np.random.seed(2026)
v2 = np.random.normal(0, 1, 1000)

start_time = time.time()
x_cvx_large = cp.Variable(1000)
prob_large = cp.Problem(cp.Minimize(0.5 * cp.sum_squares(x_cvx_large - v2)),
                       [x_cvx_large >= 0, cp.sum(x_cvx_large) == 1])
prob_large.solve()
cvx_time = time.time() - start_time

start_time = time.time()
x_alg_large, _ = project_simplex_sorting(v2)
alg_time = time.time() - start_time

error_large = np.linalg.norm(x_cvx_large.value - x_alg_large)
print(f"CVX 运行时间: {cvx_time:.4f} 秒")
print(f"排序算法运行时间: {alg_time:.4f} 秒")
print(f"两者解的误差 (L2 norm): {error_large:.2e}")

大规模测试
CVX 运行时间: 0.0380 秒
排序算法运行时间: 0.0000 秒
两者解的误差 (L2 norm): 2.85e-14

问题五¶

In [14]:
import numpy as np
import cvxpy as cp
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

t = np.array([0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5], dtype=float)
c = np.array([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 9], dtype=float)
A = np.column_stack([np.ones(6), t])

# (3)
x_l1 = cp.Variable(2)
objective_l1 = cp.Minimize(cp.norm1(A @ x_l1 - c))
prob_l1 = cp.Problem(objective_l1)
prob_l1.solve()

a_l1, b_l1 = x_l1.value
val_l1 = prob_l1.value

print("L1 优化结果:")
print(f"  x* (a, b) = [{a_l1:.4f}, {b_l1:.4f}]")
print(f"  最优值 = {val_l1:.4f}")

L1 优化结果:
  x* (a, b) = [1.0000, 1.0000]
  最优值 = 3.0000
In [15]:
# (4)
x_l2 = cp.Variable(2)
objective_l2 = cp.Minimize(cp.norm(A @ x_l2 - c, 2)**2)  # 习惯上最小化平方和
prob_l2 = cp.Problem(objective_l2)
prob_l2.solve()

a_l2, b_l2 = x_l2.value
val_l2 = prob_l2.value

print("\nL2 优化结果:")
print(f"  x* (a, b) = [{a_l2:.4f}, {b_l2:.4f}]")
print(f"  最优值 = {val_l2:.4f}")

L2 优化结果:
  x* (a, b) = [0.4286, 1.4286]
  最优值 = 4.2857
In [16]:
# 绘图
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.scatter(t, c, color='red', label='Data points')

t_range = np.linspace(-0.5, 5.5, 100)
y_l1 = a_l1 + b_l1 * t_range
y_l2 = a_l2 + b_l2 * t_range

plt.plot(t_range, y_l1, 'g-', label=f'L1: y = {a_l1:.2f} + {b_l1:.2f}t')
plt.plot(t_range, y_l2, 'b--', label=f'L2: y = {a_l2:.2f} + {b_l2:.2f}t')

plt.xlabel('t')
plt.ylabel('y')
plt.title('对比L1 and L2范数')
plt.legend()
plt.grid(True)
plt.show()
